This repository contains a cron job that runs regularly [https://github.com/k-yle/wikidata-taginfo-link/actions using GitHub Actions].
It generates a [https://osm.wiki/Taginfo/Projects taginfo project file] for every OSM tag and key which is referenced by a Wikidata item or property.
The cron job commits [https://github.com/k-yle/wikidata-taginfo-link/raw/gh-pages/taginfo.json the autogenerated file] to the [https://github.com/k-yle/wikidata-taginfo-link/commits/gh-pages gh-pages branch].

Wikidata items and properties are included if they have [https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Property:P1282 OpenStreetMap tag<sup>(P1282)</sup>] or [https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Property:P13786 OpenStreetMap key<sup>(P13786)</sup>].

For example, [http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q549237 sailmaker<sup>(Q549237)</sup>] is included because it has [https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Property:P1282 OpenStreetMap tag<sup>(P1282)</sup>] set to [https://taginfo.osm.org/tags/craft=sailmaker craft=sailmaker].

Note: This script was created in 2026, because the original script from 2014 is [https://github.com/taginfo/taginfo-projects/pull/266 abandoned and no longer works].
